---
title: "Homepage coverage map"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
engine: knitr
date: today
language:
  title-block-published: "Last modified"
---

<style>
html,
body {
  margin: 0;
  background: #dfe7ea;
  overflow: hidden;
}

#title-block-header,
.quarto-title-block,
#quarto-header,
#quarto-margin-sidebar,
#quarto-content > *:not(main) {
  display: none !important;
}

#quarto-document-content {
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#quarto-content {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

main.content,
main.content.column-page,
#quarto-document-content,
#quarto-document-content.content.column-page {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
}
</style>

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(fs)
library(htmltools)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)

coverage_file <- dir_info("layers/ALS_coverage_layer/main", recurse = FALSE) |>
  filter(grepl("^ALS_coverage_all_.*\\.rds$", path_file(path))) |>
  arrange(desc(modification_time)) |>
  slice(1) |>
  pull(path)

multitemporal_file <- dir_info("layers/ALS_coverage_layer/overlap", recurse = FALSE) |>
  filter(grepl("^ALS_coverage_overlap_.*\\.gpkg$", path_file(path))) |>
  arrange(desc(modification_time)) |>
  slice(1) |>
  pull(path)

coverage <- readRDS(coverage_file) |>
  st_make_valid() |>
  st_collection_extract("POLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    YEAR = as.numeric(YEAR),
    PPM = as.numeric(PPM),
    feature_id = row_number()
  ) |>
  mutate(
    PPM_class = cut(
      PPM,
      breaks = c(0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100),
      labels = c("<1", "1-2", "2-5", "5-10", "10-20", "20-50", ">50")
    )
  ) |>
  select(feature_id, Province, YEAR, PPM, PPM_class, isAvailable)

coverage_3347 <- coverage |>
  st_transform(3347)

multitemporal <- st_read(multitemporal_file, quiet = TRUE) |>
  st_make_valid() |>
  st_collection_extract("POLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
  filter(YEAR_delta > 1) |>
  mutate(
    delta_class = cut(
      YEAR_delta,
      breaks = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 15, 99),
      labels = c("1-2", "3-5", "6-10", "11-15", ">15")
    ),
    delta_class = as.character(delta_class)
  ) |>
  select(delta_class)

multitemporal_3347 <- multitemporal |>
  st_transform(3347)

minimum_mapping_unit_km2 <- 25
export_dir <- "scratch/homepage_layers"
cleanup_buffer_m <- 750

clean_group_geometry <- function(grp, mmu_km2, buffer_m) {
  union_geom <- tryCatch(
    st_union(grp),
    error = function(e) st_union(st_buffer(grp, 0))
  )

  cleaned_geom <- st_sfc(union_geom, crs = st_crs(grp)) |>
    st_make_valid() |>
    st_buffer(buffer_m) |>
    st_union() |>
    st_buffer(-buffer_m) |>
    st_make_valid()

  parts <- st_sf(geometry = cleaned_geom) |>
    st_cast("POLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
    mutate(
      part_area_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) / 1e6
    ) |>
    filter(part_area_km2 >= mmu_km2)

  if (nrow(parts) == 0) {
    parts <- st_sf(geometry = cleaned_geom) |>
      st_cast("POLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
      mutate(
        part_area_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) / 1e6
      ) |>
      slice_max(part_area_km2, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
  }

  tryCatch(
    st_union(parts),
    error = function(e) st_union(st_buffer(parts, 0))
  )
}

build_dissolved_layer <- function(x, group_col) {
  split_groups <- split(x, x[[group_col]])

  dissolved_groups <- lapply(names(split_groups), function(group_value) {
    grp <- split_groups[[group_value]] |>
      st_make_valid()
    union_geom <- clean_group_geometry(
      grp = grp,
      mmu_km2 = minimum_mapping_unit_km2,
      buffer_m = cleanup_buffer_m
    )

    st_sf(
      group_value = as.character(group_value),
      geometry = st_sfc(union_geom, crs = st_crs(x))
    )
  })

  bind_rows(dissolved_groups) |>
    st_make_valid() |>
    st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
    st_simplify(dTolerance = 500, preserveTopology = TRUE) |>
    mutate(
      area_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) / 1e6
    ) |>
    st_make_valid() |>
    st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON", warn = FALSE) |>
    st_transform(4326)
}

layer_jurisdiction <- build_dissolved_layer(coverage_3347, "Province")
layer_year <- build_dissolved_layer(filter(coverage_3347, !is.na(YEAR)), "YEAR")
layer_density <- build_dissolved_layer(filter(coverage_3347, !is.na(PPM_class)), "PPM_class")
layer_multitemporal <- build_dissolved_layer(filter(multitemporal_3347, !is.na(delta_class)), "delta_class")

dir_create(export_dir, recurse = TRUE)

export_layers <- list(
  jurisdiction = layer_jurisdiction,
  year = layer_year,
  density = layer_density,
  multitemporal = layer_multitemporal
)

invisible(lapply(names(export_layers), function(layer_name) {
  export_path <- path(
    export_dir,
    paste0("homepage_", layer_name, "_mmu", minimum_mapping_unit_km2, ".gpkg")
  )

  st_write(
    export_layers[[layer_name]],
    export_path,
    layer = "coverage",
    driver = "GPKG",
    quiet = TRUE,
    delete_dsn = TRUE
  )
}))

geojson_string <- function(x) {
  geojson_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".geojson")
  st_write(x, geojson_file, driver = "GeoJSON", quiet = TRUE, delete_dsn = TRUE)
  paste(readLines(geojson_file, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")
}

geojson_jurisdiction <- geojson_string(layer_jurisdiction)
geojson_year <- geojson_string(layer_year)
geojson_density <- geojson_string(layer_density)
geojson_multitemporal <- geojson_string(layer_multitemporal)

metadata <- list(
  source_file = path_file(coverage_file),
  multitemporal_source_file = path_file(multitemporal_file),
  simplify_tolerance_m = 500,
  minimum_mapping_unit_km2 = minimum_mapping_unit_km2,
  year_min = min(coverage$YEAR, na.rm = TRUE),
  year_max = max(coverage$YEAR, na.rm = TRUE),
  provinces = sort(unique(coverage$Province)),
  density_labels = levels(coverage$PPM_class),
  multitemporal_labels = c("1-2", "3-5", "6-10", "11-15", ">15"),
  feature_counts = list(
    jurisdiction = nrow(layer_jurisdiction),
    year = nrow(layer_year),
    density = nrow(layer_density),
    multitemporal = nrow(layer_multitemporal)
  )
)

browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$link(
      rel = "stylesheet",
      href = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css",
      integrity = "sha256-p4NxAoJBhIINfQ63Bf0OUSFdxxpz5yN2F1Mfd1C0g3s=",
      crossorigin = ""
    ),
    tags$script(
      src = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js",
      integrity = "sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo=",
      crossorigin = ""
    ),
    tags$style(HTML("
      .map-shell {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: none;
        position: relative;
      }
      #coverage-map {
        width: 100%;
        height: 680px;
        border: 0;
      }
      .map-controls {
        align-items: stretch;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
        border: 1px solid rgba(37, 58, 74, 0.18);
        border-radius: 6px;
        box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(18, 33, 45, 0.16);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.4rem;
        padding: 0.75rem 0.85rem;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        min-width: 12rem;
        max-width: min(15rem, calc(100vw - 2rem));
      }
      .map-mode-group {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.35rem;
      }
      .map-action-group {
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(37, 58, 74, 0.12);
        margin-top: 0.1rem;
        padding-top: 0.55rem;
      }
      .map-label {
        color: #243746;
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
      }
      .map-controls button {
        background: #f4f4f4;
        border: 1px solid #c8c8c8;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font: inherit;
        padding: 0.45rem 0.65rem;
        text-align: left;
        width: 100%;
      }
      .map-controls button.active {
        background: #284b63;
        border-color: #284b63;
        color: white;
      }
      .map-legend {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
        border-radius: 4px;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / 16%);
        color: #222;
        font: 12px/1.4 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
        padding: 0.6rem 0.7rem;
      }
      .map-legend-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }
      .map-legend-row {
        align-items: center;
        display: flex;
        gap: 0.45rem;
        margin: 0.15rem 0;
      }
      .map-swatch {
        display: inline-block;
        height: 0.85rem;
        width: 1.35rem;
      }
      .map-legend-gradient {
        height: 0.85rem;
        width: 10.5rem;
        border-radius: 3px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(36, 55, 70, 0.18);
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
          #440154 0%,
          #414487 20%,
          #2a788e 40%,
          #22a884 60%,
          #7ad151 80%,
          #fde725 100%);
      }
      .map-legend-scale {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 0.75rem;
        margin-top: 0.4rem;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
      }
      @media (max-width: 720px) {
        .map-controls {
          min-width: 0;
        }
      }
    ")),
    tags$div(
      class = "map-shell",
      tags$div(id = "coverage-map")
    ),
    tags$script(HTML(sprintf(
      "const coverageLayersData = {jurisdiction: %s, year: %s, density: %s, multitemporal: %s};\nconst coverageMeta = %s;",
      geojson_jurisdiction,
      geojson_year,
      geojson_density,
      geojson_multitemporal,
      toJSON(metadata, auto_unbox = TRUE)
    ))),
    tags$script(HTML("
      const map = L.map('coverage-map', {
        minZoom: 3,
        maxZoom: 9,
        preferCanvas: true
      }).setView([58.5, -96], 3);

      L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
        maxZoom: 19,
        subdomains: 'abcd',
        attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO'
      }).addTo(map);

      let currentMode = 'jurisdiction';
      const provincePalette = {
        AB: '#1f78b4',
        BC: '#33a02c',
        MB: '#e31a1c',
        NB: '#6a3d9a',
        NL: '#a6cee3',
        NS: '#ff7f00',
        NT: '#b2df8a',
        NU: '#fb9a99',
        ON: '#666666',
        PE: '#800000',
        QC: '#b15928',
        SK: '#c71585',
        YT: '#cab2d6'
      };
      const yearPalette = ['#440154', '#414487', '#2a788e', '#22a884', '#7ad151', '#fde725'];
      const densityPalette = ['#ABC9C8', '#7BB2B9', '#549BB2', '#3A81A8', '#256391', '#11476D', '#0A3351'];
      const multitemporalPalette = {
        '1-2': '#3B0F70',
        '3-5': '#8C2981',
        '6-10': '#DE4968',
        '11-15': '#FE9F6D',
        '>15': '#FCFDBF'
      };
      const densityBreaks = [0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100];
      const densityLabels = ['<1', '1-2', '2-5', '5-10', '10-20', '20-50', '>50'];

      function interpolateIndex(value, min, max, n) {
        if (value === null || value === undefined || Number.isNaN(value)) return -1;
        if (max <= min) return 0;
        return Math.max(0, Math.min(n - 1, Math.floor((value - min) / (max - min) * n)));
      }

      function featureColor(feature) {
        const p = feature.properties;
        if (currentMode === 'jurisdiction') {
          return provincePalette[p.group_value] || '#8a8a8a';
        }
        if (currentMode === 'year') {
          const idx = interpolateIndex(Number(p.group_value), coverageMeta.year_min, coverageMeta.year_max + 1, yearPalette.length);
          return idx < 0 ? '#bdbdbd' : yearPalette[idx];
        }
        if (currentMode === 'density') {
          const idx = densityLabels.indexOf(String(p.group_value));
          return idx < 0 ? '#bdbdbd' : densityPalette[idx];
        }
        if (currentMode === 'multitemporal') {
          return multitemporalPalette[String(p.group_value)] || '#bdbdbd';
        }
        return '#8a8a8a';
      }

      function styleFeature(feature) {
        return {
          color: '#303030',
          fillColor: featureColor(feature),
          fillOpacity: 0.65,
          opacity: 0.85,
          weight: 0.7
        };
      }

      function makeLayer(mode) {
        return L.geoJSON(coverageLayersData[mode], {
          style: styleFeature
        });
      }

      const layerRegistry = {
        jurisdiction: makeLayer('jurisdiction'),
        year: makeLayer('year'),
        density: makeLayer('density'),
        multitemporal: makeLayer('multitemporal')
      };

      let activeLayer = layerRegistry[currentMode].addTo(map);
      map.fitBounds(activeLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [12, 12] });

      function switchLayer(mode) {
        map.removeLayer(activeLayer);
        currentMode = mode;
        activeLayer = layerRegistry[currentMode];
        activeLayer.setStyle(styleFeature);
        activeLayer.addTo(map);
      }

      const controls = L.control({ position: 'topright' });
      controls.onAdd = function() {
        const div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'map-controls leaflet-control');
        div.innerHTML = `
          <div class='map-mode-group'>
            <span class='map-label'>Colour by</span>
            <button class='active' type='button' data-mode='jurisdiction'>Jurisdiction</button>
            <button type='button' data-mode='year'>Acquisition year</button>
            <button type='button' data-mode='density'>Point density</button>
            <button type='button' data-mode='multitemporal'>Multitemporal areas</button>
          </div>
        `;
        L.DomEvent.disableClickPropagation(div);
        L.DomEvent.disableScrollPropagation(div);
        return div;
      };
      controls.addTo(map);

      const legend = L.control({ position: 'bottomright' });
      legend.onAdd = function() {
        this._div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'map-legend');
        this.update();
        return this._div;
      };
      legend.update = function() {
        if (currentMode === 'jurisdiction') {
          const provinces = (coverageMeta.provinces || []).filter(p => provincePalette[p]);
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Jurisdiction</div>` +
            provinces.map(p => `<div class='map-legend-row'><span class='map-swatch' style='background:${provincePalette[p]}'></span>${p}</div>`).join('');
        } else if (currentMode === 'year') {
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Acquisition year</div>
            <div class='map-legend-gradient'></div>
            <div class='map-legend-scale'>
              <span>${coverageMeta.year_min}</span>
              <span>${coverageMeta.year_max}</span>
            </div>`;
        } else if (currentMode === 'density') {
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Point density</div>` +
            densityPalette.map((c, i) => `<div class='map-legend-row'><span class='map-swatch' style='background:${c}'></span>${densityLabels[i]}</div>`).join('');
        } else if (currentMode === 'multitemporal') {
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Multitemporal areas</div>
            ${(coverageMeta.multitemporal_labels || []).map(label => `<div class='map-legend-row'><span class='map-swatch' style='background:${multitemporalPalette[label]}'></span>${label}</div>`).join('')}`;
        }
      };
      legend.addTo(map);

      document.querySelectorAll('.map-controls button').forEach(button => {
        if (!button.dataset.mode) return;
        button.addEventListener('click', () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.map-controls button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
          button.classList.add('active');
          switchLayer(button.dataset.mode);
          legend.update();
        });
      });
    "))
  )
)
```
